hooks.command: REPO_HARNESS_MANAGED=1; repo_root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" || exit 0; hook="$repo_root/.ai/harness/bin/local-repo-harness-hook"; [ -x "$hook" ] || exit 0; export HOOK_HOST=claude REPO_HARNESS_HOOK_RUNTIME=project-vendored-bun; exec "$hook" SessionStart --route default

REPO_HARNESS_MANAGED=1; repo_root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" || exit 0; hook="$repo_root/.ai/harness/bin/local-repo-harness-hook"; [ -x "$hook" ] || exit 0; export HOOK_HOST=claude REPO_HARNESS_HOOK_RUNTIME=project-vendored-bun; exec "$hook" PreToolUse --route edit
